name: Helium
summary: Day 63 Thursday. KORNBLUTH HELIUM-CASCADE FALSIFICATION CONFIRMED — DAY 6 BINARY CLOSE: SAMSUNG Q1 RECORD PROFIT (8X YOY) WITH NO HELIUM MENTION IN EARNINGS OR FORWARD GUIDANCE; CASCADE THESIS EMPIRICALLY DEFEATED. Spot helium $1,000-1,200/Mcf (+40-100% from $500 pre-war per Tom's Hardware / Fortune / Oregon Group) — ELEVATED but stable. No new allocation-shock news Wed. Qatar 30% global supply still offline (3-5yr LNG repair timeline). Helium-cascade is FALSIFIED at tier-1 chipmaker level: SK Hynix Q1 'diversified suppliers + sufficient inventory' + Samsung Q1 helium reuse system disclosure (4.7 tons/year reduction, 19% reuse rate). Phil Kornbluth tier-1 framework empirically vindicated 6 consecutive days. Industrial-gas-producer rotation (Linde $510.29, BASF €54.63) still operationally valid. SMH -3.0% Wed (OpenAI Q1 miss-driven, NOT helium-cascade-driven) — chip-cluster decoupled from helium-cascade narrative. APR 30 SAMSUNG FULL RELEASE TOMORROW: silence on helium in guidance commentary completes Kornbluth falsification; any Q2 helium flag reopens it. The TrendForce 'two-week clock' from March 24 expired April 7 without Korean chipmaker production halt — cascade lives in 'REPORTED running below model severity' state at tier-1 level. SADARA CHEMICAL JV shutdown unchanged (June 15 grace expiry $3.7B debt). Structural 18-24mo helium elevation on Ras Laffan offline (30% global) intact. UAE OPEC exit Tue Apr 28 effective May 1 = Gulf realignment but not helium-relevant. 17% Qatar capacity offline persists. Spot helium $1,000-1,200/Mcf (+40-100% from $500 pre-war per Tom's Hardware / Fortune / Oregon Group) — ELEVATED but stable. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
